video.title: Worlds 2024 - T1 vs BLG - Grand Final

topComments.text: Faker showed us some glimpse of His old self on Game 4 and 5, you can feel his thirst and aggression, undisputed GOAT ❤

THE UNKILLABLE DEMON KING

Congratulations !!!

Insane Grand Final ❤

That Galio plays by faker in the last game was just goated. What I love about this player is the fact that he doesn't seem to be under pressure even at the most crucial moments. He just keeps the stream flowing as smoothly as possible. But anyway, T1 as a team are amazing and congrats to my goated team ❤.
They went from losing game 5 from the LCK 4th seed to winning game 5 as the LCK 4th seed!

Rekkles win
KKoma getting Rekkles in there as well to lift the trophy might have just healed a part of me that I didn't know needed healing
6:24:06 support plays DOES NOT GO UNNOTICED
Keria cancels Ahri's TP, tower diving him with the ult. Legendary play off screen.

No DDoS attack, no doubts, NOTHING could stop T1! Despite everything thrown their way, they proved that champions rise above it all. From facing questions about their form to the relentless setbacks, T1 fought through every challenge with unwavering determination. They silenced the critics and showed the world what true greatness looks like! *Congratulations on an unstoppable run, T1!* 🏆🔥
respect to kkoma them for calling rekkles to lift the trophy

Faker really channeled his suppressed rage and aggression in game 4 and game 5. Sending them to game 5 and another world championship title. It's nice to see his old self unleashed! Goat indeed! 🥳🏆❤️‍🔥
Keria actually stopped Knights Teleport, which was crucial. No one Touched on this, Big Play.

*LEGENDS NEVER DIE!* Watching T1 take Worlds by storm reminds us why they're the greatest of all time! From Faker’s iconic plays to every team member's execution, T1 has shown the true spirit of esports. Congratulations to the KING OF KINGS and his unstoppable squad! GGWP T1, you’ve made history again! 👑🍀

Truly peak. 😭😭😭 Faker's the undisputed GOAT but Oner's my GOAT. Keria played so well this entire series, and T1 (see: Faker) just clutched it games 4 and 5.

Can't wait for what skin Oner picks!

I stayed up until 8:00am to see my team of 11 years win

To quote a certain caster,
"THE FAITHFUL SHALL BE REWARDED!"
What an incredible series, and congratulations! Both teams played incredibly well throughout the series, and I truly felt I was rooting on all 10 players out there. What an amazing way to end the year!

T1 Is The Past, it means the First Dynasty (2013-2016)
T1 is the Present, it Means the Second Dynasty (2022-2024)

And T1 is the Future (Incoming Worlds Buff) 💗💗
I’m so proud of this team. Like genuinely 😭, they’ve come so far, even if they had a rough summer and spring split. I hope they stay together and renew their contracts 💗 T1 FIGHTING!!!💗💗💗
KERIA AND FAKER THE MVPS OF THE FINALS ACTUALLY INCREDIBLE.
T1 dont even have to ban Bins Jax and Knight Ahri to Cook them xD
What a finals, I love everything about it from top to bottom. Congrats to T1 especially Faker to 5th title, BLG should not be ashamed they are one tough team to beat, they'll get back stronger.

T1 for the win! I knew they would win, I knew it.
Faker deserved Finals MVP as well. Some of those plays and catches were absolutely insane.
Fifth Worlds win, still not lost to an LPL team in a best of series at Worlds, and has now matched the number of Worlds wins from other regions combined again.
Congratulations to T1!
ABSOLUTE PEAK LEAGUE OF LEGENDS

The past, the present, and the future of League— *T1 is eternal!* 🏆 Faker, the unstoppable Demon King, led this team to glory once again, proving why legends never fade. Congrats, T1, for another historic win! 👑🔥
MVP: _F A K E R_

For the old man's haters, I think they can swallow their ego and accept that T1 and Faker are all that, that there is a reason for so much "egg drooling". believe that after today it is impossible to be a hater of a guy like the faker, just accept reality, applaud and be grateful for watching the legend play live, because all this emotion that he, like T1, provides every year, in some years this will end. Be grateful for being in the same era as the legend and have the privilege of being able to watch him play happily.
Congrats Rekkles on winning worlds!!!
Faker, you’re the ultimate role model! Thankful for the inspiration you bring us all. You're a legend on and off the Rift! 🙌

keyInsights.comment: Faker showed us some glimpse of His old self on Game 4 and 5, you can feel his thirst and aggression, undisputed GOAT ❤
the despair in Knights face after seeing his teammates lose the fight because Keria cancelled his TP 6:24:05
After 6 heart attacks and 5 strokes, I can finally sleep happily.

It's ironic that T1 is the LPL slayer. Because T1's color is red and they now have 5 stars, and you know what else is red and has 5 stars? They've defeated so many LPL teams that they became LPL itself.
